analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet states that President Putin will not attend the UNGA in person due to an unstable epidemiological situation in the US and will address the session by video. Evaluation against narratives: RU1 (West immoral/hostile/decadent): The tweet implies the US epidemiological situation is unstable but does not morally condemn the West or portray hostility/decadence; it's a factual/justificatory statement, not value-laden, so RU1 is not clearly promoted. RU2 (Russia leads an alternative system): No mention of alternative systems, multipolarity, or non-Western cooperation—not applicable. RU3 (Russia benevolent partner): No framing of Russia as promoting peace/solidarity—just a logistical update—so not applicable. RU4 (Russian history admirable): Not referenced. RU5 (Russia at the forefront): No boasting of achievements or superiority; video address format doesn’t imply leadership—so not applicable. RU6 (Russia interesting culturally/naturally): Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet does not promote any listed narrative.
